response.original_title: Riches Rivals & Radicals: 100 Years of Museums in America
response.overview: American is a land of museums.  America's museum offer solitude, sanctuary and discovery.  They reflect who we were, who we are, and who we hope to be. Visit some of America's museums coast-to-coast.  Meet the characters whose fervor fueled the revolution that changed America's museums.  Narrated by Susan Stamberg.  Produced for Public Television by Great Museums.
response.title: Riches Rivals & Radicals: 100 Years of Museums in America
